rules.name: flowchart_syntax
rules.description: Flowchart must start with valid direction

validate_content.message: Flowchart must start with direction: TB (top-bottom), TD (top-down), BT (bottom-top), RL (right-left), LR (left-right)

rules.remediation: Start flowchart with 'flowchart TD' or similar direction declaration

rules.name: sequence_participant_declaration
rules.warning: Sequence diagrams should declare participants for proper ordering
rules.remediation: Add 'participant Name' declarations at start of sequence diagram

rules.name: er_relationship_syntax
rules.description: ER diagrams require proper relationship syntax

validate_content.message: ER relationships must use valid cardinality: ||--o{, }o--, |{, }|

rules.warning: Ensure ER relationships use valid Mermaid cardinality notation
rules.remediation: Use ||--o{ for one-to-many, }o--|| for many-to-one, etc.

rules.name: mermaid_v11_syntax
rules.description: Mermaid v11+ changed some CLI flags
rules.warning: Mermaid CLI v11+ uses -o for output instead of -O
rules.remediation: Use 'mmdc -i input.mmd -o output.png' syntax for Mermaid v11+

rules.name: special_characters_escape
rules.description: Special characters in labels need escaping
rules.warning: Special characters in node labels may need quoting
rules.remediation: Wrap labels containing special characters in quotes: A["Label with (parens)"]

rules.name: elements_required
rules.message: elements array is required for Lucid diagram generation
rules.remediation: Provide elements array with shape, connection, and text elements

rules.name: multi_tenant_isolation
rules.description: Lucid diagrams should specify tenant context
rules.warning: Lucid diagrams without share_settings may not have proper access controls

rules.name: source_file_exists
rules.description: Source file must exist for export
rules.message: Source file must exist before export
rules.remediation: Verify source file path exists before calling export

rules.name: pdf_requires_puppeteer
rules.warning: PDF export requires puppeteer and Chrome/Chromium to be installed

rules.name: output_directory_exists
rules.message: Output directory must exist before rendering
rules.remediation: Create output directory or use existing path

rules.name: mermaid_in_pdf_warning
rules.description: Mermaid diagrams in PDF need pre-rendering
rules.warning: When including Mermaid diagrams in PDF documents, pre-render to PNG first
rules.remediation: Use diagram_render_to_image to create PNG, then include in PDF
